tools.name: manycontacts.context
tools.description: Get ManyContacts account overview: WhatsApp Business channels, contact/user/tag counts, active AI agents, and enabled features. Use this first to understand the account state.

tools.name: manycontacts.contacts.list
tools.description: List WhatsApp Business contacts with filters (tags, team, date, unread, blacklist, scheduled). Returns paginated results.

tags.description: Comma-separated tag IDs (contacts must have ALL tags)

date_to.description: Filter updated before date (YYYY-MM-DD, max 90 days range)

unread.description: Set to 'true' for only contacts with unread messages

blacklist.description: Set to 'true' for only blacklisted contacts

scheduled.description: Set to 'true' for only contacts with pending scheduled messages

tools.name: manycontacts.contacts.get
tools.description: Get detailed information about a WhatsApp Business contact including tags, teams, and funnel stages.

phone.description: Phone number with country code, e.g. 34600000000

tools.name: manycontacts.contacts.create
tools.description: Create a new WhatsApp Business contact in ManyContacts CRM.

phone.description: Phone number with country code, e.g. 34600000000

tools.name: manycontacts.contacts.update
tools.description: Update an existing WhatsApp Business contact (name, notes, custom fields).

phone.description: Phone number with country code, e.g. 34600000000

tools.name: manycontacts.contacts.delete
tools.description: Delete a WhatsApp Business contact from ManyContacts CRM.

phone.description: Phone number with country code, e.g. 34600000000

tools.name: manycontacts.contacts.assign
tools.description: Assign a WhatsApp Business contact to a team member.

phone.description: Phone number with country code, e.g. 34600000000

userId.description: User ID to assign the contact to

tools.name: manycontacts.contacts.unassign
tools.description: Unassign a WhatsApp Business contact (remove current user assignment).

phone.description: Phone number with country code, e.g. 34600000000

tools.name: manycontacts.contacts.close
tools.description: Close a WhatsApp Business conversation.

phone.description: Phone number with country code, e.g. 34600000000

tools.name: manycontacts.contacts.open
tools.description: Reopen a closed WhatsApp Business conversation.

phone.description: Phone number with country code, e.g. 34600000000

tools.name: manycontacts.contacts.tag.add
tools.description: Add a tag to a WhatsApp Business contact.

phone.description: Phone number with country code, e.g. 34600000000

tools.name: manycontacts.contacts.tag.remove
tools.description: Remove a tag from a WhatsApp Business contact.

phone.description: Phone number with country code, e.g. 34600000000

tools.name: manycontacts.contacts.team.add
tools.description: Add a team to a WhatsApp Business contact.

phone.description: Phone number with country code, e.g. 34600000000

tools.name: manycontacts.contacts.team.remove
tools.description: Remove a team from a WhatsApp Business contact.

phone.description: Phone number with country code, e.g. 34600000000

tools.name: manycontacts.contacts.set_stage
tools.description: Move a WhatsApp Business contact to a funnel/pipeline stage.

phone.description: Phone number with country code, e.g. 34600000000

tools.name: manycontacts.contacts.bulk
tools.description: Perform bulk operations on multiple WhatsApp Business contacts (close, open, assign, add_tag, add_team).

action.description: Bulk action: close, open, assign, add_tag, or add_team

value.description: Value for action (user_id for assign, tag_id for add_tag, team_id for add_team)

tools.name: manycontacts.messages.list
tools.description: List WhatsApp Business messages for a contact. Shows the conversation history with timestamps and status.

phone.description: Phone number with country code, e.g. 34600000000

tools.name: manycontacts.messages.send.text
tools.description: Send a WhatsApp Business text message to a phone number.

phone.description: Phone number with country code, e.g. 34600000000

tools.name: manycontacts.messages.send.note
tools.description: Send an internal note on a WhatsApp Business contact (not visible to the contact).

phone.description: Phone number with country code, e.g. 34600000000

tools.name: manycontacts.messages.send.template
tools.description: Send a WhatsApp Business template message (for outbound messaging outside the 24h window).

phone.description: Phone number with country code, e.g. 34600000000

variables.description: Template variables as JSON array, e.g. '["John","20%"]'

tools.name: manycontacts.templates.list
tools.description: List WhatsApp Business message templates. Templates are required for sending messages outside the 24h conversation window.

status.description: Filter by template status: approved, pending, or rejected

tools.name: manycontacts.templates.get
tools.description: Get details of a specific WhatsApp Business message template including components and configuration.

tools.name: manycontacts.templates.sync
tools.description: Sync WhatsApp Business templates from Meta Cloud API. Fetches the latest templates from the connected WhatsApp Business account.

tools.name: manycontacts.campaigns.list
tools.description: List WhatsApp Business bulk messaging campaigns with statistics (sent, delivered, read, failed counts).

tools.name: manycontacts.campaigns.create
tools.description: Create a WhatsApp Business bulk messaging campaign. Sends a template message to a list of phone numbers at a scheduled time.

phones.description: Comma-separated phone numbers to send to

date.description: Scheduled send date in ISO format, e.g. 2026-12-01T09:00:00

variables.description: Template variables as JSON array, e.g. '["John","20%"]'

tools.name: manycontacts.campaigns.delete
tools.description: Delete a WhatsApp Business campaign.

tools.name: manycontacts.org.get
tools.description: Get WhatsApp Business organization/account information (name, timezone, settings).

tools.name: manycontacts.org.update
tools.description: Update WhatsApp Business organization settings (timezone, auto-reply, webhooks, etc.).

tools.name: manycontacts.org.schedule.get
tools.description: Get the business hours schedule for the WhatsApp Business account.

tools.name: manycontacts.org.apikey
tools.description: Get the organization API key.

tools.name: manycontacts.channels.list
tools.description: List connected WhatsApp Business and Instagram channels.

tools.name: manycontacts.tags.list
tools.description: List all tags for categorizing WhatsApp Business contacts.

tools.name: manycontacts.tags.create
tools.description: Create a new tag for WhatsApp Business contacts.

tools.name: manycontacts.tags.update
tools.description: Update an existing WhatsApp Business contact tag.

tools.name: manycontacts.tags.delete
tools.description: Delete a WhatsApp Business contact tag.

tools.name: manycontacts.teams.list
tools.description: List teams in the WhatsApp Business organization.

tools.name: manycontacts.teams.create
tools.description: Create a new team in the WhatsApp Business organization.

tools.name: manycontacts.teams.add_member
tools.description: Add a user to a team.

tools.name: manycontacts.teams.remove_member
tools.description: Remove a user from a team.

tools.name: manycontacts.teams.delete
tools.description: Delete a team from the WhatsApp Business organization.

tools.name: manycontacts.funnels.list
tools.description: List sales funnels/pipelines for organizing WhatsApp Business contacts by stage.

tools.name: manycontacts.funnels.create
tools.description: Create a new sales funnel/pipeline for WhatsApp Business contacts.

tools.name: manycontacts.funnels.add_stage
tools.description: Add a stage to a sales funnel/pipeline.

tools.name: manycontacts.funnels.update_stage
tools.description: Update a stage in a sales funnel/pipeline.

tools.name: manycontacts.funnels.contacts
tools.description: List contacts in a funnel/pipeline, optionally filtered by stage.

tools.name: manycontacts.funnels.delete
tools.description: Delete a sales funnel/pipeline.

tools.name: manycontacts.users.list
tools.description: List team members/users in the WhatsApp Business organization.

tools.name: manycontacts.users.get
tools.description: Get details of a specific team member/user.

tools.name: manycontacts.users.update
tools.description: Update a team member/user profile.

tools.name: manycontacts.users.invite
tools.description: Invite a new team member to the WhatsApp Business organization.

tools.name: manycontacts.users.delete
tools.description: Remove a team member from the WhatsApp Business organization.

tools.name: manycontacts.ai_agents.list
tools.description: List AI agents configured to auto-respond to WhatsApp Business messages.

tools.name: manycontacts.ai_agents.get
tools.description: Get details of a specific WhatsApp AI agent including scenarios and configuration.

tools.name: manycontacts.ai_agents.update
tools.description: Update a WhatsApp AI agent's configuration (instructions, active status, etc.).

tools.name: manycontacts.ai_agents.feedback
tools.description: Get feedback/conversation logs for a WhatsApp AI agent.

prompts.name: contact-lookup
prompts.description: Look up a WhatsApp contact and summarize their profile, tags, funnel stage, and recent messages

arguments.name: phone
arguments.description: Phone number in international format, e.g. +34612345678

prompts.name: send-campaign
prompts.description: Guide through creating and sending a WhatsApp bulk campaign with a template

prompts.name: daily-dashboard
prompts.description: Get a complete overview of your ManyContacts account: channels, teams, open conversations, and recent activity

prompts.name: reply-to-contact
prompts.description: Draft and send a WhatsApp message to a contact after reviewing their conversation history

arguments.name: phone
arguments.description: Phone number in international format, e.g. +34612345678

prompts.name: manage-funnel
prompts.description: View sales funnels, their stages, and contacts in each stage to manage your sales pipeline

prompts.name: bulk-tag-contacts
prompts.description: Tag multiple WhatsApp contacts at once by applying a tag to a list of phone numbers

arguments.name: tagName
arguments.description: Name of the tag to apply
